CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(CSAT__c, "Very Dissatisfied"), 1,IF(ISPICKVAL(CSAT__c, "Somewhat Dissatisfied"),2,IF(ISPICKVAL(CSAT__c, "Neither Satisfied nor Dissatisfied"),3,IF(ISPICKVAL(CSAT__c, "Somewhat Satisfied"),4,IF(ISPICKVAL(CSAT__c, "Very Satisfied"),5,0)))))
CustomField.label: CSAT Score
